chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3918 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.15704/2023 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition 28.02.2025 Ms. Nosheen Tajjamul, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh The petition seeks to assert rights in respect of immoveable property and / or agitates monetary claim in respect thereof. Prima facie this matter cannot be adjudicated without recourse to evidence etc. Even otherwise since the matter stated to pertain to land acquisition, the parent statute itself contains the grievance redressal mechanism. No case for direct recourse is maintainable in writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
